case_for: Evans has shown a high ceiling twice in the past six weeks (23+ points in wk4 and wk5), demonstrating he can explode for big totals when the matchup or game script favors him.
case_against: His recent volatility includes multiple sub-10-point outings (wk2, wk3, wk6, wk7), and the pregame projection of 9.5 sits well below the 12.0 threshold, suggesting a below-average expectation.
